rows:
The ELS_Command code in the Sequence
being rejected is invalid.

The request identified by the ELS_Command
code and Payload content is invalid or
logically inconsistent for the conditions
present.

The Link Service is logically busy and unable
to process the request at this time.

This indicates that an error has been detected
that violates the rules of the ELS Protocol that
are not specified by other error codes.

The Recipient of a Link Service command is
unable to perform the request at this time.

The Recipient of a Link Service command
does not support the command requested.

The Vendor specific error bits may be used by
Vendors to specify additional reason codes.
